note: perf v0.3 — tier-1 (fast). batch=1, seq=16 = 16 tokens. Compile ALREADY wins 2.04x at tier-1, unlike Dbrx (0.93x).
interpretation: Even with 3 graph breaks, Jamba compile beats eager because the breaks are concentrated in _update_mamba_mask (a small helper) and most of the Mamba/attention compute still gets graphs.
